positive: A vibrant, stylized illustration of a majestic fox curled up in a crescent moon, surrounded by celestial floral elements and glowing constellations. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau poster art and modern graphic line work, featuring thick, contrasting black outlines and a limited, deep color palette of indigo, burnt orange, and gold leaf accents. Composition should be highly centered and balanced, utilizing negative space for maximum impact on fabric. High contrast, symmetrical composition, print-ready vector aesthetic, suitable for screen printing.
